sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value1 String, value2 Nullable(Int32), value3 Float64);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'test', NULL, 3.14), (2, 'check', 2, 2.71), (3, '', NULL, 1.618);
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id UInt32, join_value String);
SELECT id, tuple(value1, value2) AS tuple_values FROM test_table WHERE tuple(value1, value2) == tuple('check', 2);
SELECT id, AVG(value3) AS avg_value3 FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING avg_value3 == 3.14;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM join_table WHERE join_id == id AND join_value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, value1 FROM test_table WHERE value2 IS NULL AND (value1 == 'test' OR value1 == 'check');
SELECT t1.id, t1.value1, tuple(t1.value1, t2.join_value) FROM test_table t1 JOIN join_table t2 ON t1.id == t2.join_id WHERE t1.value1 != '';
SELECT id, count() FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING count() > 1 AND tuple(value1, value3) == tuple('', 1.618);
SELECT join_id, join_value FROM join_table WHERE join_value IS NULL OR join_value IN (SELECT value1 FROM test_table WHERE value2 == 2);
